metadata.notes: agent=yes daemon=full driver=ready — #719/#775 read+serve the conversations/<conv>.db, and finalizeSummary surfaces SessionMetrics.TotalTokens as summary.total_tokens gated to antigravity; the live recording's golden shows total_tokens=16316 and total_tokens_nonzero PASSES. Session model is the TWO-PHASE presession (proc-<PID> reconciles to the conv-id; pid_discovered on the conv-id, no process_exited) — verified against events.jsonl. Per-turn input/output breakdown, CACHE-READ, and COST stay unobservable (deferred to #716).

assessment.body:
## Verdict

**agent=yes** — `agy` does per-turn token accounting; the figures persist to the per-conversation SQLite store (`<root>/conversations/<conv>.db`, `gen_metadata` protobuf blobs).

**daemon=full** (for the tokens-nonzero half) — A token signal reaches the daemon AND now reaches the verify engine's golden summary.
- #719 `applyDBMetrics` (parser.go:180) runs on `turn_done`: it reads the sibling store (`readStoreModelTokens` → `decodeGenMetadata`) and sets `ev.Tokens = &tailer.TokenSnapshot{Total: contextTokens}` (the in-context prompt-token count, gen_metadata field #5) plus the canonical model id (field #19). `applyTokenSnapshot` (tailer_metrics.go:128) folds that into `SessionMetrics.TotalTokens` (the context bar), which grows turn-over-turn as context accumulates (non-decreasing).
- #775 (a31bc2e2) captures the store (`curate-lifecycle-fixture.sh:187` → `store/conversations/<conv>.db` +wal/+shm) and serves it in replay (`replaystore.go StageReplayStore` ↔ `tailer.ReplayStoreStager`, wired at `replayengine/engine.go:172`). A fresh multi-turn recording captures the db and replay resolves it, so `TotalTokens` is lit on each `turn_done` during replay.
- THE UNBLOCK: `finalizeSummary` (cmd/replay/metrics.go:34,59-60) now takes the adapter name and, for `adapter == antigravity.AdapterName && lastMetrics.TotalTokens > 0`, surfaces `report.Summary.TotalTokens` into the golden `summary.total_tokens` (types.go:147) — gated to antigravity so every other adapter's golden stays byte-identical. `of verify` reads this via the new `total_tokens_nonzero` assertion (`summary.total_tokens > 0`, observations.go:165-167 / expected.go:94), which is DISTINCT from the cum-based `tokens_nonzero` (`cum_input+cum_output>0`). So the dashboard-visible nonzero token count (context occupancy from the db) is now a genuinely-verified observable.

**driver=ready** — the stale `gap:wait_turn` is cleared: `driver-interactive.sh` declares `wait_turn` in `DRIVE_ELICITS` (line 113) and implements it (line 292, turn-count poll + run_command permission-dialog auto-accept). The recipe needs only send/wait_turn/sleep, all present.

## Honest scope — what total_tokens means here, and what stays deferred to #716

antigravity's `TotalTokens` is a CONTEXT-OCCUPANCY snapshot: the current in-context prompt-token count read from the db on each turn_done. It grows as the conversation context accumulates (non-decreasing), and it satisfies `total_tokens_nonzero` after the first turn — but it is NOT the per-turn cum-usage accumulator (`cum_input + cum_output`) the scenario describes for claudecode. `decodeGenMetadata` (dbmetrics.go:131) decodes ONLY model (#19) + contextTokens (#5); there is no per-turn input/output/cache breakdown, those proto fields are unlabeled with no ground truth (#716, CLOSED not-planned). Consequences:
- the cum-based `tokens_nonzero` is NOT asserted (`cum_input/cum_output` stay 0 — applyDBMetrics never feeds the cum path; tailer_metrics.go:142-153 has no firing case for a Total-only snapshot).
- COST is NOT observable: `cumByModel` is empty so the legacy cost path computes `EstimatedCostUSD = 0`. `cost_nonzero` is NOT asserted.
- the CACHE-READ clause (CacheRead>0, fresh-input=0) has no surface at all on antigravity. NOT asserted.

This is NOT known_failing: the spec asserts only what is genuinely observable (`total_tokens_nonzero` + the three-turn lifecycle arc), and documents the per-turn-usage / cache / cost halves as out of scope (deferred to #716).

## Session model — TWO-PHASE presession (corrected by the live recording)

This recipe's recording PROVES antigravity creates a transient `proc-<PID>` presession that reconciles to the conv-id session — contrary to the single-birth model of the sibling 1.x cells (where agy reported its scratch dir as cwd so the PID never bound). The recording's `events.jsonl` shows: `proc-94573` (`transcript_new` → `presession_created` → `state_transition ready` 'new session created' → `pid_discovered`), then a DISTINCT conv-id session `18ee78b4-…` (`transcript_new` → `state_transition ready` → working/ready ×3); a `pid_discovered` then fires on the conv-id and the proc-row is `transcript_removed` (×2). The multi-turn recipe binds the PID (`pid_discovered` on the conv-id) where the single-turn 1.x recipes did not. The spec therefore uses the presession two-phase model: `presession_birth` then `session_birth` (new_session), with every post-birth phase anchored to the REAL conv-id session (never the proc-row, which never goes working), plus a `pid_bind` phase. NO `process_exited` appears in this recording, so NO teardown phase is asserted.
caveats: total_tokens is a context-occupancy db snapshot (current in-context prompt tokens, grows with the conversation, non-decreasing) — NOT the per-turn cum-usage accumulator the scenario describes for claudecode. It satisfies total_tokens_nonzero but the cum-based tokens_nonzero (cum_input+cum_output>0) stays 0 and is intentionally NOT asserted.
COST deferred to #716: cumByModel is empty so the legacy cost path computes EstimatedCostUSD=0; cost_nonzero is not asserted.

CACHE-READ deferred to #716: decodeGenMetadata (dbmetrics.go:131) decodes only model+contextTokens, no input/output/cache breakdown; the cache-read clause (CacheRead>0, fresh-input=0) has no observable surface on antigravity.

MODEL left provisional: #719 writes the db canonical dash-form id (NormalizeModelName, parser.go:189) to ev.ModelName on turn_done, which now overrides the <USER_SETTINGS_CHANGE> display name ('Gemini 3.1 Pro') in a served-store recording. Let record fill the recorded model_name.

total_tokens surfacing is gated to antigravity in finalizeSummary (metrics.go:59) so all other adapters' goldens stay byte-identical; verify reads it via total_tokens_nonzero, distinct from tokens_nonzero.

SESSION MODEL: this multi-turn recipe binds the PID, so the recording shows the two-phase presession (proc-<PID> reconciles to the conv-id; pid_discovered on the conv-id) — UNLIKE the single-turn 1.x cells where agy's scratch-dir cwd prevented PID binding. The spec uses presession_birth -> session_birth -> pid_bind, every post-birth phase anchored to the conv-id. No process_exited in this recording, so no teardown phase.

sources.note: applyDBMetrics on turn_done sets ev.Tokens = &TokenSnapshot{Total: contextTokens} + canonical model id; tokens-only, no input/output split.
decodeGenMetadata decodes ONLY model (#19) and contextTokens (#5 prompt tokens = context occupancy); no per-turn input/output/cache breakdown (those proto fields are #716).

StageReplayStore (tailer.ReplayStoreStager, #775): rebuilds the live brain/conversations layout in the replay scratch dir from store/conversations/<conv>.db so storePathForTranscript resolves the captured store.
engine calls StageReplayStore when the parser implements ReplayStoreStager, relocating the transcript so the staged store is found in replay.

applyTokenSnapshot folds a Total-only snapshot into metrics.TotalTokens (context occupancy); the cum path (142-153) has no firing case for Input==Output==0, so cum_input/cum_output stay 0 (why tokens_nonzero is not asserted).

finalizeSummary takes the adapter name and surfaces lastMetrics.TotalTokens into summary.total_tokens for adapter==antigravity (gated so other goldens stay byte-identical) — the unblock for the tokens-nonzero half.
summary.total_tokens field + total_tokens_nonzero assertion (cur.TotalTokens > 0), distinct from the cum-based tokens_nonzero (line 30).
total_tokens_nonzero spec field documented as summary.total_tokens > 0.
DRIVE_ELICITS includes wait_turn and wait_turn() is implemented (turn-count poll + run_command permission auto-accept) — the stale gap:wait_turn is cleared.
antigravity capture: copies <root>/conversations/<conv>.db (+wal/+shm) under store/conversations/ when recording the cell.

Live recording PROVES the two-phase presession: proc-94573 (presession_created -> state_transition ready -> pid_discovered), then conv-id 18ee78b4 (state_transition ready -> working/ready x3); pid_discovered on the conv-id then transcript_removed of the proc-row. NO process_exited. Golden summary.total_tokens=16316 (model_name=gemini-pro-default).

preconditions: agy CLI on PATH and authenticated (Google OAuth)
irrlichd is recording (dev daemon with --record / isolated mode)
the recording rig runs curate-lifecycle-fixture.sh so the sibling conversations/<conv>.db is captured under store/conversations/
setup: Driver launches agy in a fresh cwd under <staging>/cwd/
No special model flag — the assertion is the three-turn lifecycle arc on a single conv-id session plus total_tokens_nonzero from the served store

script.text: Reply with exactly the word: ok
Reply with exactly the word: ok
Reply with exactly the word: ok

verify: events.jsonl shows a proc-<PID> presession reconciling to the conv-id session, then three ready→working→ready cycles on that conv-id session (one per turn); pid_discovered binds to the conv-id; no process_exited
the captured store/conversations/<conv>.db is present so replay resolves it; finalizeSummary surfaces summary.total_tokens > 0 (context occupancy lit on each turn_done)
OUT OF SCOPE (deferred to #716): cum_input/cum_output stay 0 so tokens_nonzero is not asserted; cost + cache-read not asserted
